name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-17
title: tdd-context.py guidance for 'impl' state references nonexistent test/run.sh
description: tdd-context.py guidance_for('impl') returns 'Implementation in progress. Run test/run.sh frequently...' but the feature spec mandates Python-only (test/run.py — see Invariant 'Scripting Tech Stack' and test-python-only-tech-stack.py). The guidance steers subagents toward a script that does not exist, then they may try to invoke it and fail. Fix: replace 'test/run.sh' with 'test/run.py'.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3: BUG-16 flat deprecation_criterion key; BUG-17 test/run.py; BUG-37 item.json in SKILL.md B/B mode.
